{"timestamp":"2026-03-15T07:25:05.544339101Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":57107,\"title\":\"[MPG Emitter] Support markAsNonResource client option to exclude ARM resource models from provider schema\",\"body\":\"## Background\\n\\nDuring Swagger-to-TypeSpec migration of **Azure.ResourceManager.EventHubs**, we discovered a feature gap: some ARM resource models (e.g. `NetworkSecurityPerimeterConfiguration`) were treated as **non-resources** in the old Swagger-based SDK via the `request-path-is-non-resource` directive, but are promoted to full ARM resources in the TypeSpec definition.\\n\\nThis causes backward-incompatible API surface changes — operations that belonged to the parent resource (e.g. `EventHubsNamespaceResource`) now appear on a new child resource type that didn\\u0026#39;t exist in the prior SDK.\\n\\n## Feature\\n\\nAdd support for the `markAsNonResource` client option in the MPG C# emitter, allowing TypeSpec authors to annotate a resource model so the emitter excludes it from the ARM provider schema.\\n\\n### Usage in TypeSpec\\n\\n```tsp\\n@@clientOption(NetworkSecurityPerimeterConfiguration, \\u0026#34;markAsNonResource\\u0026#34;, true, \\u0026#34;csharp\\u0026#34;);\\n```\\n\\n### Behavior\\n\\n- The emitter reads `@clientOption(\\u0026#34;markAsNonResource\\u0026#34;, true)` via TCGC\\u0026#39;s `getClientOptions()` API\\n- Matching resource entries are removed from `ArmProviderSchema`\\n- Their operations become `NonResourceMethod[]` and are reassigned to the nearest parent resource via path prefix matching\\n- If a marked resource is a **parent** of another resource, a warning is emitted and the resource is kept (child-resource reparenting is not yet supported)\\n\\n### Design Principles\\n\\n- **Parsing is centralized**: all `@clientOption` decorators are parsed into a `Map` early in the pipeline\\n- **Application is per-option**: each option (e.g. `markAsNonResource`) has its own exported apply function, called at the appropriate pipeline phase — extensible for future client options\\n- **Generator is unaware**: the generator faithfully follows the emitter\\u0026#39;s TspCodeModel output. It never knows a resource was marked as non-resource\\n\\n## Implementation\\n\\nBranch: `feature/mark-as-non-resource`\\n\\n### Files Changed\\n\\n- **`emitter/src/client-option-processor.ts`** (new) — core logic: `parseResourceClientOptions()`, `applyMarkAsNonResource()`\\n- **`emitter/src/resource-detection.ts`** (modified) — integration in `updateClients()`\\n- **`emitter/test/mark-as-non-resource.test.ts`** (new) — 4 test cases:\\n  1. Child resource removal with operation reassignment\\n  2. Multi-path resource removal (same model at multiple paths)\\n  3. Parent resource guard (warning + keep)\\n  4. No-op when no `@clientOption` is present\\n\\n### Test Results\\n\\nAll 67 emitter tests pass (0 regressions across 4 test files).\\n\\n## Limitations\\n\\n- Marking a resource that is a **parent** of another resource is not supported yet (warning emitted, resource kept)\\n- Requires TCGC \\u0026gt;= 0.65.x for `getClientOptions()` API\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57107\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"haiyuazhang\",\"id\":1924967,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/haiyuazhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1924967?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-03-15T07:22:44Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-15T07:24:35Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

Per triage preconditions, issues with existing labels are skipped to avoid overwriting manual triage already performed."},"name":"noop"}}}
